entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The primary agricultural crop being evaluated for yield stability and disease resistance.

entities.name: BACTERIAL WILT
entities.description: A disease caused by Ralstonia solanacearum that acts as a production constraint for groundnut.

entities.name: RALSTONIA SOLANACEARUM
entities.description: The bacterial organism that causes bacterial wilt in groundnut plants.

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: The geographical region where bacterial wilt is a significant constraint for groundnut production.

entities.name: INDONESIA
entities.description: The country where the research on groundnut cultivars and bacterial wilt was conducted.

entities.name: JAVA
entities.description: The specific location in Indonesia where the bacterial wilt endemic areas were situated.

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural trait measuring the productivity of groundnut pods.

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO BACTERIAL WILT
entities.description: The trait describing the ability of groundnut cultivars to resist infection by Ralstonia solanacearum.

entities.name: GAJAH
entities.description: An improved groundnut cultivar that showed stable resistance to bacterial wilt across multiple locations.

entities.name: MLGG 0627
entities.description: A groundnut cultivar used as a susceptible check in the study.

entities.name: ICRISAT GERMPLASM
entities.description: The genetic material from ICRISAT used to develop breeding lines for groundnut.
